DMFDWITCHMOD-ATRUUM_DEN.title: Atruum's Den
DMFDWITCHMOD-ATRUUM_DEN.pages.INITIAL.de: This is the altar of Atruum, the Astral Dragon. I didn't expect to find one in the Spire. Perhaps I can change my [gold]Dragon Contract[/gold] here.
DMFDWITCHMOD-ATRUUM_DEN.pages.MORE.optio: Go back to the previous page.
DMFDWITCHMOD-ATRUUM_DEN.pages.MORE.descr: Choose a contract to swap to:
DMFDWITCHMOD-ATRUUM_DEN.pages.POISON.des: The old contract vanishes, and Atruum's venomous seal seeps into your palm.
DMFDWITCHMOD-ATRUUM_DEN.pages.WIND.descr: The old contract vanishes, and Atruum's windborne seal stirs around you like a fresh gale.
DMFDWITCHMOD-ATRUUM_DEN.pages.THUNDER.de: The old contract vanishes, and Atruum's storm-charged seal rings with distant thunder.
DMFDWITCHMOD-ATRUUM_DEN.pages.ICE.descri: The old contract vanishes, and Atruum's frostbound seal cools your blood.
DMFDWITCHMOD-ATRUUM_DEN.pages.FIRE.descr: The old contract vanishes, and Atruum's flame-bright seal burns beneath your skin.
DMFDWITCHMOD-ATRUUM_DEN.pages.LEAVE.desc: There is no need to change contracts, so you turn and leave.
DMFDWITCHMOD-ATRUUM_DEN.pages.NO_CONTRAC: The altar waits, but no Astral Dragon Contract answers its call. You move on.
